'''zhongapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hobblesome|hobblesome]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hobblesome|hobblesome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhongapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongapithi|zhongapithi]] || [[word:zhongapiji|zhongapiji]] || [[word:zhongapishi|zhongapishi]] || [[word:zhongapiki|zhongapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongaputhuthu|zhongaputhuthu]] || [[word:zhongapujuju|zhongapujuju]] || [[word:zhongapushushu|zhongapushushu]] || [[word:zhongapukuku|zhongapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongaputhu|zhongaputhu]] || [[word:zhongapuju|zhongapuju]] || [[word:zhongapushu|zhongapushu]] || [[word:zhongapuku|zhongapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongapufthuf|zhongapufthuf]] || [[word:zhongapufjuf|zhongapufjuf]] || [[word:zhongapufshuf|zhongapufshuf]] || [[word:zhongapufkuf|zhongapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongapethe|zhongapethe]] || [[word:zhongapeje|zhongapeje]] || [[word:zhongapeshe|zhongapeshe]] || [[word:zhongapeke|zhongapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongapothotho|zhongapothotho]] || [[word:zhongapojojo|zhongapojojo]] || [[word:zhongaposhosho|zhongaposhosho]] || [[word:zhongapokoko|zhongapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongapotho|zhongapotho]] || [[word:zhongapojo|zhongapojo]] || [[word:zhongaposho|zhongaposho]] || [[word:zhongapoko|zhongapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongapofthof|zhongapofthof]] || [[word:zhongapofjof|zhongapofjof]] || [[word:zhongapofshof|zhongapofshof]] || [[word:zhongapofkof|zhongapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongapĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongapĂŠthĂŠ|zhongapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhongapĂŠjĂŠ|zhongapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhongapĂŠshĂŠ|zhongapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhongapĂŠkĂŠ|zhongapĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongapathatha|zhongapathatha]] || [[word:zhongapajaja|zhongapajaja]] || [[word:zhongapashasha|zhongapashasha]] || [[word:zhongapakaka|zhongapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongapatha|zhongapatha]] || [[word:zhongapaja|zhongapaja]] || [[word:zhongapasha|zhongapasha]] || [[word:zhongapaka|zhongapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongapafthaf|zhongapafthaf]] || [[word:zhongapafjaf|zhongapafjaf]] || [[word:zhongapafshaf|zhongapafshaf]] || [[word:zhongapafkaf|zhongapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhongapasha|zhongapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhongapshĂ«sha|zhongapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhongaprosha|zhongaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhongapmusha|zhongapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhongapyasha|zhongapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhongapnkshĂ«sha|gozhongapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhongapnkrosha|gozhongapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhongapnkmusha|gozhongapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhongapnkyasha|gozhongapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhongangapasha|zhongangapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhongangapshĂ«sha|zhongangapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhongangaprosha|zhongangaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhongangapmusha|zhongangapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhongangapyasha|zhongangapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhongangapnkshĂ«sha|gozhongangapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhongangapnkrosha|gozhongangapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhongangapnkmusha|gozhongangapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhongangapnkyasha|gozhongangapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhengĂŠpasha|zhengĂŠpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhengĂŠpshĂ«sha|zhengĂŠpshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhengĂŠprosha|zhengĂŠprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhengĂŠpmusha|zhengĂŠpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhengĂŠpyasha|zhengĂŠpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠpnkshĂ«sha|gozhengĂŠpnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠpnkrosha|gozhengĂŠpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠpnkmusha|gozhengĂŠpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠpnkyasha|gozhengĂŠpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhongfapasha|zhongfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhongfapshĂ«sha|zhongfapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhongfaprosha|zhongfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhongfapmusha|zhongfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhongfapyasha|zhongfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhongfapnkshĂ«sha|gozhongfapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhongfapnkrosha|gozhongfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhongfapnkmusha|gozhongfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhongfapnkyasha|gozhongfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
